headline: NetApp Partners with Google Cloud to Adopt AI-Driven Operations

headline: NetApp Strengthens its Collaboration with Google Cloud on Unified Google Cloud Storage for File and Block
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., April 22, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today shared new innovations that help customers better leverage their enterprise data, by tapping into the benefits of AI with Google Cloud.

headline: NetApp: Decent Revenue Growth, Stronger Earnings Growth
summary: NetApp earnings grow as margins surge via higher-ASP all-flash and first-party cloud partnerships.

headline: Why Is NetApp (NTAP) Stock Trending Overnight
